taskDescription: Upgrade Context Galaxy from force-graph-with-halos to interactive space scene with real orbits and document navigation. Includes 3 fixes (commit hygiene, library decision, dynamic re-layout) and 5 visual/interaction upgrades (starfield, orbits, wiki/collections styling, doc nav, polish).

scope.constraint: Galaxy is gitignored from public release (commit 4f47675) — internal dev tool only. No public-API obligations.

discoveryResults.notes: Galaxy is a self-contained internal web app; not part of the agent/skill ecosystem. No discovery hits on galaxy/dashboard/visualization tags.

phases: Phase 0: Commit hygiene — split 912a8ab; stash unrelated WIP
Phase 1: Library decision — spike both options, choose, document
Phase 2: Layout state machine — dynamic re-layout on toggle/swap
Phase 4: Real orbits — tilted ellipses, orbit rings, rotation (HEADLINE)
Phase 5: Wiki / Collections distinct node styles
Phase 6: Document navigation — fly-in, markdown preview, breadcrumb
Phase 7: Polish — keyboard, touch, minimap, ambient particles
Phase 8 (FIXED END): Integration audit + ecosystem state + learnings

tasks.content: Stash unrelated WIP (update.py, job-index-health.md, refresh_ecosystem_state.py)
Soft-reset 912a8ab; recommit dashboard atlas refactors as separate commit
Recommit galaxy scaffolding as second commit with proper message
Verify .gitignore still excludes bcos-galaxy from public release
Restore stashed WIP
Spike branch A: upgrade 3d-force-graph to latest; test if 1.79+ tickFrame race is fixed
Spike branch B: replace 3d-force-graph with raw three.js + d3-force; validate atlas data still renders
Decision: pick library; document trade-off in galaxy.js header comment
If migrating: remove custom render-loop workaround; consolidate THREE imports
Verify all current features still work (sun corona, halos, modes, drawer, HUD)
Delete diag.html / diag2.html (no longer needed once main scene is stable)
Extract layout pass into pure function: atlas → positions[]
Wire ambient toggle to re-run layout without full graph rebuild
Wire repo swap to re-run layout (data swap only, scene persists)
Smooth-transition camera + node positions on layout change
Generate THREE.Points starfield (~3000 particles, log-distance falloff)
Add subtle nebula sprite (radial gradient texture, additive blend)
Replace solid #03030a backgroundColor with skybox gradient
Tune density / brightness so foreground stars stay readable
Compute orbit parameters per domain: radius (degree-weighted), tilt, phase offset
Position domain anchors on orbit around sun (replace force-cluster centroids)
Position siblings on inner orbits around their domain anchor
Draw faint orbit rings (THREE.RingGeometry, dim opacity, additive blend)
Add second-level folder/engagement gravity wells for repos with meaningful folder structure
Animate orbital rotation (slow; respect prefers-reduced-motion)
Remove dead d3 cluster-force code; update layoutCluster() / atlasToGraphData()
Verify atlas/lifecycle/freshness modes still work with orbital positions
Detect node type from path (_wiki/, _collections/, active) in atlasToGraphData
Wiki nodes: distinct geometry (e.g. octahedron) + cooler tone
Collections nodes: distinct geometry (e.g. cube/box) + warmer tone
Update HUD legend to show new node types
Mark _planned/wiki-and-collections-zones-rollout.md:67 as resolved
Add marked.js (CDN, pinned version) to index.html
Server: add /api/doc?path=... endpoint returning raw markdown
Drawer: expand to full-pane mode on click; render markdown via marked
Camera fly-in animation: focus on clicked star, zoom to surface
Next/prev neighbor keys (J/K or arrows) traverse via edges
Breadcrumb trail of visited stars; back button to retrace
Esc key + background click exit full-pane mode and zoom out
Keyboard nav: arrows pan camera, +/- zoom, R reset
Touch/pinch gestures via OrbitControls touch config
Minimap (corner overlay, top-down projection of nodes)
Ambient particles for archived docs (drifting dust trails)
Update README with controls cheatsheet + screenshot
Run analyze_integration.py --staged on all galaxy commits
Refresh ecosystem state (find_agents.sh, find_skills.sh, state.json)
Capture learnings: library decision rationale, orbit math, render-loop hack removal
Append session diary entry summarizing the upgrade
